channel.title: Lab on krisby.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Lab on krisby.dev

item.title: Conditional Access + Identity Protection Lab
item.description:
This lab was built to understand how risk-based Conditional Access and Identity Protection work in Microsoft Entra ID.

The goal was to:

  • Create risk-based Conditional Access policies
  • Force MFA on risky sign-ins
  • Understand user risk and sign-in risk
  • Test Identity Protection in practice
  • Analyze risky users and risky sign-ins

Architecture

User Sign-In → Identity Protection → Risk Detection → Conditional Access → MFA

Step 1 — Preparation

Verify that the tenant has the right features enabled:

item.title: Entra ID + Cloudflare Access + SCIM
item.description:
This lab was set up to understand how federation, provisioning and Zero Trust work in practice between Entra ID and Cloudflare Access.

The goal was to:

  • Use Entra ID as Identity Provider
  • Set up OIDC authentication
  • Set up SCIM provisioning
  • Automate sync of users and groups
  • Test group-based access via Cloudflare Access

Architecture

Entra ID → OIDC → Cloudflare Access

Entra ID → SCIM → Cloudflare

Step 1 — Create App Registration in Entra ID

The first step was to create an App Registration in Entra ID.

item.title: AI RBAC Analyzer
item.description:
I wanted to understand Azure RBAC better in practice and at the same time test if AI can be used as support to find over-privileged access and risks faster. The goal was not to build a perfect tool, but to combine theory with practical testing.

Step 1 – Idea and purpose

Analyze Azure RBAC assignments with a local LLM. The model should:

  • Identify broad access
  • Analyze scope
  • Give improvement suggestions based on least privilege

Step 2 – Create test environment in Azure

Created:

item.title: JML Monitor Lab
item.description:
Built a simple JML monitor for Microsoft Entra ID to understand Joiner/Mover/Leaver patterns, group-based RBAC, how access changes over time, and how to detect access drift. Also to understand how Graph API works in practice.

Step 1 – Create Entra lab

Created users in Microsoft Entra ID:

  • HR users
  • IT users
  • Admin users
  • Production users

Created groups: HR, Admin, Production, Technical administrator VM, VNET TECH.

Added users to different groups to simulate RBAC.

item.title: Hybrid identity Lab
item.description:
Build a hybrid identity between on-prem AD and Entra and test how users, groups and sync work in practice.

Environment: Windows Server 2022 · Oracle VirtualBox · Active Directory · Microsoft Entra ID · Entra Connect

Step 1 – Install Windows Server 2022

  1. Create a new VM in Oracle VirtualBox.
  2. Install Windows Server 2022.
  3. Give the server a static IP.
  4. Rename the server.
  5. Restart the server.

Step 2 – Install Active Directory

  1. Open Server Manager.
  2. Click Add Roles and Features.
  3. Install Active Directory Domain Services.
  4. Promote the server to Domain Controller.
  5. Create domain: lab.local
  6. Restart the server.

Step 3 – Create OU structure

In Active Directory Users and Computers, create the following OUs:
